description.overview: The Finnish Lapphund was bred by the Sami people to herd reindeer in the harsh Arctic climate.
description.temperament: Lappies are friendly, calm, and excellent with children. They're eager to please and adaptable.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to hip dysplasia and eye problems.
description.exercise: Moderate to high exercise needs. Love outdoor activities, especially in cold weather.

best_for: Those wanting a friendly, trainable dog
verdict.summary: Friendly Arctic herders perfect for families. Finnish Lapphunds are gentle, trainable, and great with kids. Need grooming and tolerate cold well.
